name: Karate
comment: Technical, moderate-load session — 60% of time in Z1-2 indicates substantial kata or bunkai work with rest and instruction periods. A single 175bpm spike confirms at least one explosive burst, but overall load was light (691kcal vs 908 the following day). Good session type for technical consolidation; the low Z4 time (8%) means recovery cost will be minimal going into the next day.
